description: Declarative data input for organisms/templates/widgets. Resolves against the page's `parameters.data` map at render time. Screen components use these bindings instead of literal copy.

key.description: Local name inside the template, e.g. `title`, `papers`

dataType.description: String | Number | Boolean | URL | Date | Paper | Member | Paper[] | Member[] | JSON

source.description: Dotted path into the page data context, e.g. `page.title`, `papers`, `data.papers[]`

fallback.description: Used only if source resolves to null/undefined AND required=false
